We've processed your return and a refund is on its way.

Order number:   123-4567890-1234567
Return reason:  Item not as described
Refund amount:  £34.99
Refund method:  Original payment method (Visa ending 4242)
Expected date:  5–7 business days from today

Here's a summary of what's happening:

  1. We received your returned item on 15 April 2024.
  2. Our returns team has inspected the item.
  3. A refund of £34.99 has been authorised and is being processed.

Your refund should appear on your Visa ending 4242 within 5–7 business days, depending on your bank's processing time.

If you don't see the refund after 7 business days, please contact us and reference order number 123-4567890-1234567.

Thank you for shopping with us.
